name: Sloppy Jo a La Oregon
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Crushed Sour Cream & Onion Potato Chips (for topping)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and drain fat.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients, except potato chips and orange juice, in a large bowl.
3. Simmer for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Slowly pour in the reserved pineapple juice, making sure it mixes evenly; let simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Divide the mixture into four to six servings and top each with a generous portion of crushed potato chips.
Serves 4-6.
